sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 4분기 희석 주당순이익(EPS)은 0.56달러로 전년 동기 0.43달러 대비 31% 상승했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 4분기 희석 주당순이익(EPS)은 0.56달러로 전년 동기 0.43달러 대비 31% 상승했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 라이브 이벤트, 비디오 팟캐스트, 클라우드 기반 게임 전략 등 신규 사업 영역을 확장하고 있습니다.
워너 브라더스 인수 절차를 진행 중이며, 광고 사업 규모를 2026년에 약 2배로 확대할 계획입니다.

financialHighlights.text: 4분기 희석 주당순이익(EPS)은 0.56달러로 전년 동기 0.43달러 대비 31% 상승했습니다.

watchItems.text: 워너 브라더스 인수 완료 시점과 해당 인수가 향후 재무 구조 및 콘텐츠 전략에 미칠 영향 확인이 필요합니다.
광고 매출이 2026년 목표대로 2배 성장하며 전체 매출 성장을 견인할 수 있을지 지켜봐야 합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: nts including the World Baseball Classic in Japan, expanding into more content categories like video podcasts, and scaling our cloud-first games strategy. ◦ Working to close our acquisition of Warner Bros. ◦ Sustaining healthy growth – we forecast 2026 revenue of $50.7B-$51.7B (+12%-14% year over year) with ad revenue expected to roughly double, and an operating margin of 31.5%. • The entertainment business remains vibrant and intensely competitive and we’re optimistic about our future. Our summary results, and forecast for Q1, are below. (in millions except per share data) Q4'24 Q1'25 Q2'  Normalized numeric aliases: $50.7 = 50.7달러; $51.7 = 51.7달러; $2,273 = 2,273달러; $3,347 = 3,347달러; $3,775 = 3,775달러; $3,248 = 3,248달러; $2,957 = 2,957달러; $3,906 = 3,906달러; $2,890 = 2,890달러; 11,510 million = 115억 1,000만 달러; 3,775 million = 37억 7,500만 달러; 2,890 million = 28억 9,000만 달러; 3,248 million = 32억 4,800만 달러; 2,957 million = 29억 5,700만 달러; 3,906 million = 39억 600만 달러; 1,869 million = 18억 6,900만 달러.

nd ad sales. Operating income in Q4 was $3.0B, up 30% year over year, and operating margin expanded two percentage points year over year to 25% - both slightly ahead of our forecast due primarily to the revenue upside. Diluted EPS amounted to $0.56 vs $0.43 in Q4’24 (+31% year over year), slightly above our forecast (adjusted for our 10-for-1 stock split). Net income included ~$60M of costs (booked in interest expense) related to our recent Warner Bros.-related bridge loan and associated bridge reduction financings (which was not included in our guidance). With our strong Q4 results, we met or exceeded all of our full year 2025 financial objectives. We grew revenue 16% to $45B (+17% on a F/X neutral basis) and we increased our operating margin to 29.5% for the year, up from 26.7% in 2024. We also made great progress growing advertising revenue. In 2025, which was only our third year sell  Normalized numeric aliases: $3.0 = 3.0달러; $0.56 = 0.56달러; $0.43 = 0.43달러; $60 = 60달러; $45 = 45달러.
